title: Operator one-time live staged orchestrator verification checklist v0
problem: Post internal MVP launch checkpoint, live-research maturity remains partial; operators need a documented one-time pytest checklist run for live staged orchestrator (temp DB, live_network marker) without new engine features.
acceptance_criteria: Agent report records operator checklist commands, env gates, and pass/skip interpretation.
No engine feature changes unless a checklist wiring bug is found.
Temp DB only; no export-public or public-site writes.
